items.title: Hollander POTD Rod Strickland. NYC PG played at DePaul, drafted 19th by NY in 88. Logjam w/MJax got Rod traded to SA. Had issues in SA & let go to POR in 92, where he was great but clashed w/PJ. Played w/WAS & others thru 05. Led NBA in APG in 97-98 was somehow never an All-Star.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Rod Strickland. NYC PG played at DePaul, drafted 19th by NY in 88. Logjam w/MJax got Rod traded to SA. Had issues in SA & let go to POR in 92, where he was great but clashed w/PJ. Played w/WAS & others thru 05. Led NBA in APG in 97-98 was somehow never an All-Star.
